mapper.select: SELECT ntc_notice.id, ntc_notice.title, ntc_notice.content, ntc_notice.type, ntc_notice.status, ntc_notice.level, ntc_notice.create_by, ntc_notice.update_time, ntc_notice.update_by, ntc_notice.create_by, n_knowledge_base.name as knowledge_name, n_knowledge_base.id as knowledge_base_id FROM ntc_user_notice INNER JOIN ntc_notice ON ntc_user_notice.notice_id = ntc_notice.id AND ntc_notice.is_delete = 0 LEFT JOIN ntc_knowledge_base_notice ON ntc_notice.id = ntc_knowledge_base_notice.notice_id LEFT JOIN n_knowledge_base ON n_knowledge_base.id = ntc_knowledge_base_notice.knowledge_base_id AND n_knowledge_base.is_delete = 0 WHERE ntc_user_notice.user_id = #{userId};
